# The Temp Company
> Specialist labour hire supplying temporary traffic management workers across New Zealand.

The Temp Company is a New Zealand staffing business focused on traffic management labour hire, supplying certified TTM Workers, STMS, and Lead STMS to traffic management companies and civil contractors across Wellington, Blenheim and Christchurch.

## Services
- Temporary traffic management staffing
- Labour hire for civil contractors and infrastructure projects
- TTM Worker through to Lead STMS placements
- Short notice crew supply

## Regions
- Wellington: 23 Meachen St, Seaview, Lower Hutt
- Blenheim / Marlborough: 7 Freswick St, Blenheim
- Christchurch / Canterbury: 25 Blakes Rd, Belfast, Christchurch

## Contact
- Email: info@thetempcompany.co.nz
- Website: https://www.thetempcompany.co.nz

## Part of MW Group
The Temp Company is part of MW Group, which also includes Men at Work Traffic Management, MW Training & Planning, and QualCard.

- Hire staff: https://www.thetempcompany.co.nz/hire-staff
- Find work: https://www.thetempcompany.co.nz/find-work
- Request staff: https://www.thetempcompany.co.nz/request-staff
- Apply for work: https://www.thetempcompany.co.nz/find-work/apply
- About: https://www.thetempcompany.co.nz/about-us
- Contact: https://www.thetempcompany.co.nz/contact
